query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_ai_inactive_dispatch_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  leadId INT NOT NULL,
  sentAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  message TEXT,
  INDEX idx_lead_sent (leadId, sentAt)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_ai_inactive_dispatch_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  leadId INT NOT NULL,
  sentAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  message TEXT,
  INDEX idx_lead_sent (leadId, sentAt)
);
